ALFW Test Harness

Runs standalone: pasted into Perchance's html panel, or served locally for dev.

World clock

(starting…)

Debug time controls Debug only

Not a gameplay verb — dispatches a bare timeContext so the tick source + dilation can be proven live before real travel/dialogue verbs exist. Multipliers: idle ×20, traveling ×60, chatting ×1.

Backgrounding this tab pauses the clock (pause-on-blur). Also callable via debugSetContext('traveling') in the console.

Player actions Rowan acts on Mira
